Scaled team leverage through **AI agent development**, building an internal LLM-powered planning tool and restructuring workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%, directly expanding the program's ability to serve more customers.

Drove product discovery across 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a phased roadmap to automate critical paths — directly informing infrastructure investment decisions and reducing customer onboarding friction at scale.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to surface operational toil patterns across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to prioritize automation investments against the highest-impact gaps and align the technical roadmap with measurable customer-facing outcomes.
